name: anonimator
description: App desktop per la pseudoanonimizzazione offline di documenti legali italiani (GDPR compliant)

scripts.dist: npx electron-vite build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:mac: npx electron-vite build && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npx electron-vite build && npm install @img/sharp-darwin-arm64@0.34.5 @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64@1.2.4 --force --no-save && (npx electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.config.js || (echo 'DMG fallback su Desktop...' && hdiutil create -volname Anonimator -srcfolder dist/mac-arm64/Anonimator.app -ov -format UDZO ~/Desktop/Anonimator-arm64.dmg))
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm install @img/sharp-darwin-x64@0.34.5 @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-x64@1.2.4 --force --no-save && npx electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.config.js && npm install @img/sharp-darwin-arm64@0.34.5 @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64@1.2.4 --force --no-save
scripts.dist:linux: npx electron-vite build && npx electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:win: npx electron-vite build && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js

author: avvocati-e-mac
